ground_truth.title: Professional Development Certification Programs | FAU Business
ground_truth.main_content: Florida Atlantic Executive Education Professional Development programs offer over 60 national and international certification programs—the most diversified selection of professional development courses in South Florida. For the third year in a row, the Financial Times ranks Florida Atlantic Executive Education Professional Development Programs No. 1 in Florida in the 2025 Executive Education Open Enrollment ranking. Florida Atlantic also ranked No. 4 in the United States. Designed and taught by subject matter experts, our programs prepare working professionals to master relevant knowledge, better their performance at work, diversify their expertise, and further their careers. Our convenient and flexible courses and certification programs are taught online, evenings, weekends or in boot camps to fit within busy lifestyles with competing priorities. Whether you are ready to become a Senior Human Resource Professional (SPHR)®, pursue the Project Management Professional (PMP)® certification, or aim to become a Certified Financial Planner (CFP)®, Florida Atlantic Executive Education Professional Development has the programs that will help advance your career aspirations. Course categories include: Accounting and Auditing, Business Technologies and Data Analytics, Finance, Healthcare Administration and Medical Business Management, Hospitality, Human Resource Management, Management and Leadership, Marketing, Project Management, Sales, Lean Six Sigma, Strategy, and Supply Management. All programs are available for corporate on-site training.
